name.ja: 元祖さっぽろラーメン横丁

description.en: Narrow alley with 17 tiny ramen shops that has been the heart of Sapporo's ramen culture since the 1950s. Each shop has its own unique miso ramen recipe.
description.ja: 1950年代からの札幌ラーメン文化の中心地。17軒の小さなラーメン店が並ぶ路地で、各店独自の味噌ラーメンが楽しめる。

address.ja: 北海道札幌市中央区南5条西3丁目

tips: Each shop seats only 8-10 people
Try the classic miso with butter and corn
Open until late — great after drinking

description.en: One of Sapporo's most beloved soup curry restaurants. Rich broth made from slowly simmered spices with huge portions of Hokkaido vegetables, chicken, or pork. Always a queue.
description.ja: 札幌で最も愛されるスープカレー店の一つ。スパイスをじっくり煮込んだ濃厚スープに北海道野菜、チキン、ポークの大盛りが特徴。常に行列。

address.ja: 北海道札幌市中央区南2条西2-6 2F

tips: Spice level 1-5, start at 3 for moderate heat
The grilled chicken leg is the most popular
Cash only

description.en: Popular soup curry chain known for crispy deep-fried toppings in a tomato-based spiced broth. The parikari (crispy) chicken in soup curry is their signature.
description.ja: トマトベースのスパイシーなスープにサクサクの揚げ物トッピングが人気のスープカレー店。パリカリチキンが看板メニュー。

address.ja: 北海道札幌市中央区南4条西5丁目

tips: The parikari chicken is a must
Choose your spice level and rice amount separately
Less crowded than GARAKU

name.ja: サッポロビール博物館

description.en: Japan's only beer museum in a stunning 1890 red-brick building. Learn Sapporo Beer's history, then taste limited-edition brews in the tasting hall including the Kaitakushi beer.
description.ja: 1890年の赤レンガ建築にある日本唯一のビール博物館。サッポロビールの歴史を学び、試飲ホールで限定ビールを味わえる。

address.ja: 北海道札幌市東区北7条東9-1-1

tips: Free self-guided tour or ¥1000 premium guided tour with tastings
Try the Kaitakushi beer — only available here
Adjacent beer garden has Genghis Khan BBQ

name.ja: だるま ジンギスカン

description.en: Sapporo's most iconic Genghis Khan (lamb BBQ) restaurant since 1954. Grill fresh lamb on a dome-shaped hot plate at the counter. Always a long queue in Susukino.
description.ja: 1954年創業の札幌を代表するジンギスカン店。カウンターのドーム型鉄板で新鮮なラム肉を焼く。すすきのでは常に行列。

address.en: Minami 5 Nishi 4, Crystal Building 1F, Chuo-ku, Sapporo 064-0805
address.ja: 北海道札幌市中央区南5条西4 クリスタルビル1F

tips: Expect 30-60 min queue
Clothes will smell like lamb — wear something washable
Order extra rice to go with the meat

description.en: Sapporo's pioneering craft brewpub since 2014. Small-batch beers brewed on-site with Hokkaido ingredients. Relaxed pub atmosphere with excellent food pairings.
description.ja: 2014年開業の札幌のクラフトビールの先駆的ブルーパブ。北海道の素材を使った少量醸造ビール。リラックスした雰囲気と料理のペアリング。

address.ja: 北海道札幌市中央区南3条西7-4

tips: Try the seasonal Hokkaido ingredient beers
Food menu changes seasonally
Can see the brewing tanks from the bar

description.en: One of Japan's oldest covered shopping streets stretching 900m through 7 blocks. Mix of classic shops, drug stores, trendy cafes, and the deep local bars of Block 7.
description.ja: 7丁目にわたる900mの日本最古級のアーケード商店街。老舗店、ドラッグストア、トレンドカフェ、7丁目のディープな地元バーが混在。

address.ja: 北海道札幌市中央区狸小路

spots.best_time: Afternoon for shopping, evening for bars
tips: Block 7 has the most local character
Covered arcade is great for rainy or snowy days
Drug stores have great deals on Japanese cosmetics

description.en: Atmospheric dining complex recreating a retro yokocho alley experience with 9 restaurants. Sample Hokkaido specialties including sushi, lamb, craft beer, and parfaits in one spot.
description.ja: レトロな横丁をイメージした9軒のダイニング施設。寿司、ラム肉、クラフトビール、パフェなど北海道グルメを一カ所で楽しめる。

address.ja: 北海道札幌市中央区南3条西4

tips: Great for groups who want different things
Try the Hokkaido seafood sushi
Night parfait culture is a Sapporo thing

description.en: Local favorite miso ramen shop away from the tourist spots. Rich, thick miso broth with perfectly curly noodles, generous chashu, and optional butter-corn topping.
description.ja: 観光地から離れた地元民に愛される味噌ラーメン店。濃厚な味噌スープにちぢれ麺、贅沢なチャーシュー、バターコーンも。

address.ja: 北海道札幌市中央区南6条西8-8-2

tips: Less touristy than Ramen Alley
The kome-miso ramen is excellent
Free rice with ramen — just ask

description.en: 1.5km green belt park that's the venue for the Snow Festival (Feb), Beer Garden (Jul-Aug), and Autumn Fest. TV Tower observation deck offers city views. Year-round corn wagon stands.
description.ja: 雪まつり(2月)、ビアガーデン(7-8月)、オータムフェストの会場となる1.5kmの公園。テレビ塔展望台から市街を一望。通年営業のとうきびワゴンも。

address.ja: 北海道札幌市中央区大通西

spots.best_time: February for Snow Festival, summer for Beer Garden
tips: Snow Festival is late Jan - early Feb
Summer beer garden is a must
Buy roasted corn from the stands

description.en: Cozy Irish-pub-style craft beer bar with an extensive selection of domestic and international bottled beers. Open until 3:30am — perfect for late-night beer exploration in Susukino.
description.ja: 国内外のボトルビールが豊富なアイリッシュパブ風クラフトビールバー。深夜3:30まで営業で、すすきのの夜更かしに最適。

address.ja: 北海道札幌市中央区南4条西3

tips: Open until 3:30am
Huge bottle selection
Good for solo bar hopping

description.en: Unique ramen shop famous for their shrimp-based broth. The concentrated ebi (shrimp) flavor in their miso or shio ramen is unlike anything else in Sapporo.
description.ja: 海老出汁のスープで有名なユニークなラーメン店。味噌や塩ラーメンの濃厚なえびの風味は札幌で唯一無二。

address.ja: 北海道札幌市中央区南7条西9-1024-10

tips: Choose between miso, shio, or shoyu broth
The ebi-miso is the most popular
Can buy instant versions at New Chitose Airport

description.en: Natural forested park at the base of Mt. Maruyama. Popular cherry blossom spot in May, with hiking trails through virgin forest. Adjacent Hokkaido Shrine is serene and less touristy.
description.ja: 円山の麓にある自然豊かな公園。5月の桜の名所で、原始林のハイキングコースも。隣接の北海道神宮は静かで観光客が少ない。

address.ja: 北海道札幌市中央区宮ヶ丘

spots.best_time: May for cherry blossoms, year-round for hiking
tips: Locals BBQ here during cherry blossom season
Easy hike to Mt. Maruyama summit (30 min)
Visit Hokkaido Shrine while here

name.ja: スープカレー しゃば蔵

description.en: Hidden gem soup curry shop with a unique lamb bone-based broth — reportedly the only one in Hokkaido. Deep, rich flavor that pairs perfectly with Hokkaido vegetables.
description.ja: 北海道で唯一とされる羊骨ベースのスープカレー。深い味わいの濃厚スープが北海道野菜と絶妙にマッチする穴場店。

address.ja: 北海道札幌市中央区南1条西13-4-54

tips: Only lamb bone soup curry in Hokkaido
Small shop — may need to wait
Try medium spice level first

description.en: Historic fish market operating since the Meiji era. Smaller and more local than Tsukiji. Fresh sea urchin, crab, and ikura served right at market stalls for breakfast.
description.ja: 明治時代から続く歴史ある魚市場。築地より小さく地元色が強い。ウニ、カニ、いくらなど新鮮な海鮮を朝から市場内で食べられる。

address.ja: 北海道札幌市中央区南3条東1

tips: Try the fresh sea urchin right at the stall
Smaller and less touristy than newer markets
Great for seafood breakfast

description.en: Sapporo's unique late-night culture of eating elaborate parfaits after drinking. Multiple parlors in Susukino serve Instagram-worthy desserts until 3am — a true local tradition.
description.ja: 飲んだ後にパフェを食べる札幌独自の「シメパフェ」文化。すすきので深夜3時まで映えるパフェを提供する店が多数。地元の伝統。

address.ja: 北海道札幌市中央区南5-6条周辺（複数店舗）

tips: Shime-parfait means 'finishing parfait' after drinks
Parfait Bar Initia and Parfaiteria PaL are popular
Uniquely Sapporo — don't skip this
